Items.Key: unbounded strcpy in evaluate_expression|buffer overflow|cwe-120|high|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|831|833|evaluate_expression|``` if (expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_)) { strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str()); } else { ... } ```|expressions larger than the 1024‑byte buffer can overflow and corrupt memory, leading to crashes or arbitrary code execution.|user inputs an expression of length 1024 or more.|use `std::strncpy` or `snprintf` with `sizeof(input_buffer_) - 1` and ensure null termination.

command injection via admin exec command|command injection|cwe-78|critical|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|606|609|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|``` std::string cmd = command.substr(5); std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; system(cmd.c_str()); ```|an authenticated admin can run arbitrary shell commands, which can compromise the system.|a user authenticates (even via emergency_override) and issues an `admin exec` command.|avoid `system()`. use a dedicated command execution api with strict whitelisting or validate the command before execution.
